title: Talent Acquisition Specialist (Tech Focus)
description:
Job Description & Requirements

About the Role

As a Talent Acquisition Specialist, you will be at the forefront of connecting top talent with high-growth opportunities in the technology sector. This role is ideal for someone early in their recruitment career, looking to gain deep industry exposure and grow in a fast-paced, collaborative environment.

Key Responsibilities

  • Source and attract candidates using a variety of channels (job boards, referrals, LinkedIn, networking) for entry-level tech roles.
  • Manage the end-to-end recruitment lifecycle: screening, scheduling, interviewing coordination, and feedback loop.
  • Build and maintain talent pipelines of both active and passive candidates.
  • Ensure alignment with hiring objectives, timelines, and compliance with employment regulations in Singapore.
  • Collaborate with hiring managers and senior recruiters to refine hiring requirements and improve process efficiency.
  • Support employer branding efforts and enhance candidate experience through proactive engagement and communication.
  • Stay updated with market trends, salary benchmarks, and developments in the tech recruitment landscape.

Minimum Qualifications

  • At least 2 years of experience in an agency or in-house recruitment setting, preferably supporting tech/IT roles.
  • Familiar with Singapore employment laws and MOM guidelines.
  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills – ability to listen, clarify, and convey information effectively.
  • Proven problem-solver with a solution-oriented mindset.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Strong sense of ownership and accountability.
  • Ability to prioritise and thrive in a fast-moving, high-volume environment.
  • Passion for employer branding and creating positive candidate experiences.

postedCompany.description:
PrimeStaff was incorporated in 1994 with the sole objective of providing quality services in recruitment and human resource management and development. With over a decade of experience in Singapore, we operate across the public and private sectors, dealing from permanent positions, contract roles to temporary assignments.
 
Assisting jobseekers and employers, PrimeStaff’s expertise spans across the Asia Pacific region. Our aim is to give employers quality staffing and individual candidates greater opportunities to succeed in their careers through a broad range of contacts and expertise.

We have succeeded in transforming a conventional business concept into one that embraces technology, without sacrificing that all-important personal touch.
 
At PrimeStaff, we are passionate about people.
